title: Azure OneLake Destination Specification
description: Configuration for Azure OneLake destination using Apache Iceberg format. Data is written to a Microsoft Fabric Lakehouse via the OneLake ADLS Gen2 DFS API.

tenant_id.title: Tenant ID
tenant_id.description: The Azure Active Directory (Entra ID) Tenant ID. Found in Azure Portal > Microsoft Entra ID > Overview > Directory (tenant) ID.

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: The Application (Client) ID of the Azure AD service principal. Found in Azure Portal > App registrations > Your App > Overview > Application (client) ID.

client_secret.title: Client Secret
client_secret.description: The client secret for the Azure AD service principal. Found in Azure Portal > App registrations > Your App > Certificates & secrets.

workspace_guid.title: Workspace GUID
workspace_guid.description: The GUID of the Microsoft Fabric workspace containing the Lakehouse.

lakehouse_guid.title: Lakehouse GUID
lakehouse_guid.description: The GUID of the Lakehouse within the workspace.
